name: Spinach Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry the spinach in a towel until very dry.
2. Grind the spinach using a food grinder with the coarse grinding plate set to speed 4.
3. Shred the cheese using a rotor slicer/shredder with the fine shredding cone (no. 4) and set to speed 4.
4. Melt butter in a saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and sauté for 5 minutes.
5. Blend flour into the melted butter, then gradually add milk, stirring until smooth. Continue cooking until thickened, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the spinach, cheese, salt, pepper, and nutmeg; set aside.
6. In a bowl, whip egg whites to stiff peaks using a wire whisk at speed 8.
7. In a clean bowl, whip egg yolks with a wire whisk at speed 4 until thick, about 1 minute.
8. Gradually fold the spinach and cheese mixture into the beaten egg whites.
9. Gently fold in the beaten egg yolks.
10. Pour the batter into a greased 1-1/2-quart dish and bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
